title: Canada. Ontario OELs (Reg. 833, Control of Exposure to Biological or Chemical Agents, as amended through 4 January 2020)

data.Agent_[CAS_No.]: *Arsenic, elemental arsenic and inorganic compounds [7440-38-2], and organic compounds (only where both inorganic and organic compounds are present), as As.
Cymene (sum of o-, m- and p-isomers) [25155-15-1]

data.TWA: See listing for Wheat Flour Dust (total dust)

data.Agent_[CAS_No.]: *Lead [7439-92-1], elemental lead, inorganic and organic compounds of lead, as Pb – except tetraethyl lead [78-00-2]
*Lead chromate [7758-97-6] – as Pb (see listing for lead) [7439-92-1]
*Mercury [7439-97-6], elemental mercury, inorganic and organic compounds of mercury, as Hg – All forms of except alkyl, as Hg
Particles (Insoluble or Poorly Soluble) Not Otherwise Specified (PNOS)
Platinum[7440-06-4] – Water-soluble compounds of, including chloroplatinates (as Pt)
Stoddard Solvent –140ºF Flash Aliphatic Solvent, Type of Stoddard Solvent

Synthetic Vitreous Fibres (Man Made Mineral Fibres) – Glass wool fibres

Synthetic Vitreous Fibres (Man Made Mineral Fibres) – Special purpose glass fibres
Synthetic Vitreous Fibres (Man Made Mineral Fibres) – Synthetic Vitreous Fibres, not otherwise classified (excluding fibrous glass dust and mineral wool fibre)
Tin, as Sn [7440-31-5] – Oxide and inorganic compounds, as Sn, except tin hydride
